#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Base (kindle, sentinel, probes, shared helpers)

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBHO_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbho multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBHO_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Module kindle — verifies prerequisite modules are kindled
#
# rbho walkthroughs do not require rbho-local state (they probe the
# filesystem directly and render via buh_*). The kindle exists to assert
# the dependency ordering is correct at furnish time.

zrbho_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBHO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbho already kindled"
  zrbgc_sentinel
  zbuz_sentinel
  zrbz_sentinel
  readonly ZRBHO_KINDLED=1
}

zrbho_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBHO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbho not kindled - call zrbho_kindle first"
}

######################################################################
# Probe utilities — no sentinels, all work pre-kindle
#
# These are filesystem probes for onboarding status. They set
# caller-scope variables; callers declare the variables locally first.

# Dashboard status line
zrbho_po_status() {
  local -r z_flag="${1:-}"
  local -r z_text="${2:-}"
  if test "${z_flag}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${z_text}"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${z_text}"
  fi
}

# Extract a KEY=VALUE from a file; stdout empty if missing.  No sourcing.
zrbho_po_extract_capture() {
  local -r z_file="${1:-}"
  local -r z_key="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_key}"  || return 1
  test -f "${z_file}" || return 1
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line; do
    case "${z_line}" in "${z_key}="*) echo "${z_line#"${z_key}="}"; return 0 ;; esac
  done < "${z_file}"
  return 1
}

######################################################################
# Shared credential probe — sets caller-scoped:
# z_has_payor, z_has_governor, z_has_director, z_has_retriever, z_secrets_dir

zrbho_probe_role_credentials() {
  z_has_payor=0
  z_has_governor=0
  z_has_director=0
  z_has_retriever=0
  z_secrets_dir=""

  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi

  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
    test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_rbro_file}"                                && z_has_payor=1
    test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"  && z_has_governor=1
    test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"  && z_has_director=1
    test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" && z_has_retriever=1
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Probe retriever walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_ru1..z_ru4
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set (from zrbho_probe_role_credentials
#           or direct extraction).

zrbho_probe_retriever_units() {
  z_ru1=0; z_ru2=0; z_ru3=0; z_ru4=0

  # Unit 1: Retriever credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_ru1=1
  fi

  # Units 2-4 require Docker
  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi

  # Unit 2: Any image from this depot's GAR exists locally
  local z_project_id="" z_region=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
    z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
  fi
  if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
    local z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_gar_prefix}"; then
      z_ru2=1
    fi
  fi

  # Unit 3: Any crucible is charged (bottle container running)
  if docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q -- "-bottle$"; then
    z_ru3=1
  fi

  # Unit 4: Kludge-tagged image exists (k-prefixed hallmark)
  if docker images --format "{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^k[0-9]"; then
    z_ru4=1
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Probe director walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_du1..z_du7
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set.
#
# Vessel assignments per docket:
#   Unit 2,4,6: rbev-sentry-deb-tether (conjure vessel)
#   Unit 5:     rbev-bottle-plantuml    (bind vessel)
#
# Probes use local filesystem + docker only (no GAR API, no gcloud).
# Units 3-7 check docker image tags — these require the user to have
# summoned (pulled) the result locally after cloud operations.
# Unit 6 (graft) is detectable without summoning because graft tags
# the local image before pushing.

zrbho_probe_director_units() {
  z_du1=0
  z_du2=0
  z_du3=0
  z_du4=0
  z_du5=0
  z_du6=0
  z_du7=0

  # Unit 1: Director credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_du1=1
  fi

  # Units 2-7 require Docker
  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi

  # Build GAR image prefix for this depot
  local z_project_id=""
  local z_region=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
    z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
  fi
  if test -z "${z_region}" || test -z "${z_project_id}"; then return 0; fi

  local -r z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
  local -r z_docker_images="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbho_probe_director_images.txt"
  local -r z_docker_stderr="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbho_probe_director_stderr.txt"

  # Collect docker images into temp file
  docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
    > "${z_docker_images}" 2>"${z_docker_stderr}" \
    || return 0

  # Load lines matching this depot's GAR prefix into array
  local z_depot_images=()
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    case "${z_line}" in
      "${z_gar_prefix}"*) z_depot_images+=("${z_line}") ;;
    esac
  done < "${z_docker_images}"

  # Single pass: match hallmark tag patterns via case
  local z_conjure_found=0
  local z_i=0
  for z_i in "${!z_depot_images[@]}"; do
    case "${z_depot_images[$z_i]}" in
      *"rbev-sentry-deb-tether:k"[0-9]*) z_du2=1 ;;
      *"rbev-sentry-deb-tether:c"[0-9]*) z_conjure_found=1 ;;
      *"rbev-bottle-plantuml:b"[0-9]*)    z_du5=1 ;;
      *"rbev-sentry-deb-tether:g"[0-9]*) z_du6=1 ;;
    esac
  done

  # Conjure implies depot foundation (reliquary + enshrine are prerequisites)
  if test "${z_conjure_found}" = "1"; then
    z_du3=1
    z_du4=1
  fi

  # Unit 7: All three modes present
  if test "${z_du4}" = "1" && test "${z_du5}" = "1" && test "${z_du6}" = "1"; then
    z_du7=1
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Probe governor walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_gu1..z_gu3
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set.
#
# Unit 1: Governor credential installed
# Unit 2: Retriever AND director credentials installed (governor created them)
# Unit 3: Functional verification — a GAR image has been pulled locally
#         (proves the full charter/knight → IAM → access chain works)

zrbho_probe_governor_units() {
  z_gu1=0; z_gu2=0; z_gu3=0

  # Unit 1: Governor credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_gu1=1
  fi

  # Unit 2: Both retriever AND director credential files exist
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_gu2=1
  fi

  # Unit 3: Functional verification — a GAR image exists locally
  # This proves the SAs the governor created actually work (IAM grants applied).
  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi

  local z_project_id="" z_region=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
    z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
  fi
  if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
    local z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_gar_prefix}"; then
      z_gu3=1
    fi
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Probe payor walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_pu1..z_pu4
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set.
#
# Unit 1: OAuth credential present (RBCC_rbro_file in secrets dir)
# Unit 2: Payor project configured (RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID non-empty)
# Unit 3: Depot provisioned (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID non-empty)
# Unit 4: Governor SA exists (governor credential file present)

zrbho_probe_payor_units() {
  z_pu1=0
  z_pu2=0
  z_pu3=0
  z_pu4=0

  # Unit 1: OAuth credential present
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_rbro_file}"; then
    z_pu1=1
  fi

  # Unit 2: Payor project configured
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrp_file}"; then
    local z_probe_line=""
    while IFS= read -r z_probe_line; do
      case "${z_probe_line}" in RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_pu2=1; break ;; esac
    done < "${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
  fi

  # Unit 3: Depot provisioned
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    local z_probe_line=""
    while IFS= read -r z_probe_line; do
      case "${z_probe_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_pu3=1; break ;; esac
    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
  fi

  # Unit 4: Governor SA credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_pu4=1
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Onboarding triage — helper and entry point

# Args: detected(0|1) role_name colophon
zrbho_triage_role() {
  local -r z_detected="${1}" z_name="${2}" z_colophon="${3}"
  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "${z_name}"; local -r z_link="${z_buym_yelp}"
  # Column pad lives OUTSIDE the link envelope so the underline/OSC-8 stop
  # at the end of the role name.  Width 13 = 12-char column + 1 separator.
  local z_pad=""
  printf -v z_pad '%*s' $((13 - ${#z_name})) ''
  if test "${z_detected}" = "1"; then
    buyy_tt_yawp "${z_colophon}"; local -r z_tt="${z_buym_yelp}"
    buh_line " [*] ${z_link}${z_pad}${z_tt}"
  else
    buh_line " [ ] ${z_link}"
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Legacy role-track functions (triage, reference, retriever, director,
# governor, payor) removed — replaced by intent-organized handbook
# tracks below. See ₣A6 paddock "Context — The Malformation".

######################################################################
# Credential installation — shared utility for retriever/director
#
# Args: role_display  role_constant  knight_tabtarget_constant  role_description
# Probes RBRR for secrets dir, checks credential file, shows install
# path, points to auth regime validator.

zrbho_credential_install() {
  local -r z_role_constant="${1}"

  # --- Probes ---
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi

  local z_cred_present=0
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" \
     && test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${z_role_constant}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_cred_present=1
  fi

  buh_step_style "Step " " — "

  # --- Step 1: Get the key file ---
  buh_step1 "Get the key file"
  buh_e
  buh_line "A ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} produces ${RBYC_RBRA} credential files for ${RBYC_DIRECTORS} and ${RBYC_RETRIEVERS}."
  buh_line "Your ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} hands you this file out-of-band — it is a"
  buh_line "secret, never committed to the repo."
  buh_e

  # --- Step 2: Install the key file ---
  buh_step1 "Install the key file"
  buh_e
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
    buh_line "Place the file at the path derived from ${RBYC_RBRR}:"
    buh_e
    buh_code "   ${z_secrets_dir}/${z_role_constant}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
    buh_e
    buh_line "Create the directory if it does not exist."
  else
    buh_warn "RBRR not populated — cannot determine credential path."
    buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "BURC" "Configure your Repo's Environment"; local -r z_env_link="${z_buym_yelp}"
    buh_line "Run ${z_env_link} first."
  fi
  buh_e
  if test "${z_cred_present}" = "1"; then
    zrbho_po_status 1 "Credential file present"
  else
    zrbho_po_status 0 "Credential file not found"
  fi
  buh_e

  # --- Step 3: Validate ---
  buh_step1 "Validate"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Run the ${RBYC_RBRA} validator for your role:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH}" "" " ${z_role_constant}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Read the output — it checks the file format and reports"
  buh_line "what the credential grants."
  buh_e

  # Callers append role-specific verification and closing steps
}

# eof

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - First Crucible (local builds)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	test -z "${ZRBHOFC_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
24	ZRBHOFC_SOURCED=1
25	
26	######################################################################
27	# First Crucible — local builds onboarding
28	#
29	# Frame 4-refined handbook: teaching prose + probes + tabtarget refs.
30	# Target learner: crucible explorer — local-only, zero cloud, fast
31	# iteration for security exploration. Zero registry, zero SA credentials.
32	#
33	# Nameplate: ccyolo  (Claude Code sandbox, Anthropic-only network)
34	# Vessels:   rbev-sentry-deb-tether (sentry), rbev-bottle-ccyolo (bottle)
35	#
36	# ₢A6AAC DRAFT — content ready for implementation review.
37	# Infrastructure gaps are marked with [INFRA-NEEDED] comments.
38	# Assumptions are marked with [ASSUMPTION].
39	
40	rbho_first_crucible() {
41	  buc_doc_brief "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, SSH, verify containment"
42	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
43	
44	  # Hardcoded for this track — ccyolo is the teaching nameplate
45	  local -r z_moniker="ccyolo"
46	  local -r z_sentry_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
47	  local -r z_bottle_vessel="rbev-bottle-ccyolo"
48	  local -r z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
49	  local -r z_ssh_tabtarget="tt/rbw-cS.SshTo.${z_moniker}.sh"
50	
51	  # Inline yelps (not worth kindle constants — track-specific)
52	  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-fk";                local -r z_cmd_rbw_fk="${z_buym_yelp}"
53	  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-cKB";               local -r z_cmd_rbw_cKB="${z_buym_yelp}"
54	  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK=";  local -r z_cmd_sentry_hallmark="${z_buym_yelp}"
55	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_ssh_tabtarget}";     local -r z_cmd_ssh="${z_buym_yelp}"
56	  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_sentry_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
57	  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_bottle_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
58	  buyy_cmd_yawp "k260413155458-f9dcb6d9"; local -r z_example_tag="${z_buym_yelp}"
59	
60	  # --- Probes ---
61	
62	  # Docker runtime
63	  local z_has_docker=0
64	  command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_has_docker=1
65	
66	  # Nameplate exists
67	  local z_nameplate_exists=0
68	  test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" && z_nameplate_exists=1
69	
70	  # Hallmarks populated in nameplate
71	  local z_sentry_hallmark="" z_bottle_hallmark=""
72	  local z_sentry_hallmark_present=0 z_bottle_hallmark_present=0
73	  if test "${z_nameplate_exists}" = "1"; then
74	    z_sentry_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK") || z_sentry_hallmark=""
75	    z_bottle_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_bottle_hallmark=""
76	    test -n "${z_sentry_hallmark}" && z_sentry_hallmark_present=1
77	    test -n "${z_bottle_hallmark}" && z_bottle_hallmark_present=1
78	  fi
79	
80	  # Kludge-tagged images exist locally (k-prefixed hallmarks)
81	  local z_sentry_image_exists=0 z_bottle_image_exists=0
82	  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
83	    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null \
84	       | grep -q "${z_sentry_vessel}:k[0-9]"; then
85	      z_sentry_image_exists=1
86	    fi
87	    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null \
88	       | grep -q "${z_bottle_vessel}:k[0-9]"; then
89	      z_bottle_image_exists=1
90	    fi
91	  fi
92	
93	  # Crucible charged
94	  # [INFRA-NEEDED] Currently rbw-cic is a tabtarget (param1 channel).
95	  # For probe use, need a scriptable function that returns 0/1 without
96	  # running the full dispatch. For now, check docker containers directly.
97	  local z_crucible_charged=0
98	  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
99	    if docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" 2>/dev/null \
100	       | grep -q "^${z_moniker}-bottle\$"; then
101	      z_crucible_charged=1
102	    fi
103	  fi
104	
105	  # --- Header ---
106	  buh_section "Start a Crucible Using Local Builds"
107	  buh_e
108	  buh_line "A ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} is a sandboxed container environment with enforced"
109	  buh_line "network isolation. You are going to build one on your workstation"
110	  buh_line "and run Claude Code inside it — no cloud account, no credentials"
111	  buh_line "beyond your own Claude subscription."
112	  buh_e
113	  buh_line "This track uses the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}: a Claude Code sandbox that can"
114	  buh_line "only reach Anthropic. Everything else is blocked."
115	  buh_e
116	
117	  # Docker gate
118	  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "0"; then
119	    buh_error "Docker is not available on this machine."
120	    buh_line  "Install Docker Desktop (or dockerd in WSL) and re-run this handbook."
121	    buh_e
122	    buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
123	    buh_e
124	    return 0
125	  fi
126	
127	  buh_line "Prerequisite: a Claude OAuth subscription (you will authenticate"
128	  buh_line "inside the container via copy/paste from your browser)."
129	  buh_e
130	
131	  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
132	
133	  # =================================================================
134	  # Step 1: Build images locally
135	  # =================================================================
136	  buh_step1 "Build images locally"
137	  buh_e
138	  buh_line "A ${RBYC_VESSEL} is a specification for a container image — a Dockerfile"
139	  buh_line "and build context. A ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is a specific build instance,"
140	  buh_line "identified by a timestamp tag."
141	  buh_e
142	  buh_line "${RBYC_KLUDGE} builds a vessel image locally using Docker — no cloud, no"
143	  buh_line "registry, no credentials. The fastest path from Dockerfile to running"
144	  buh_line "container without cloud image backup."
145	  buh_e
146	
147	  # --- Substep 1a: Kludge the sentry ---
148	  buh_step2 "Kludge the sentry"
149	  buh_e
150	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} is the gatekeeper container. It runs iptables"
151	  buh_line "and dnsmasq to enforce network policy — only domains you whitelist"
152	  buh_line "are reachable from inside."
153	  buh_e
154	  buh_line "Kludge it:"
155	  buh_e
156	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}" "" " ${z_sentry_vessel}"
157	  buh_e
158	  buh_line "The output prints a hallmark tag — something like"
159	  buh_line "${z_example_tag}"
160	  buh_line "Copy it. You will paste it into the nameplate in Step 2."
161	  buh_e
162	
163	  # Sentry kludge image probe
164	  if test "${z_sentry_image_exists}" = "1"; then
165	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Kludge-tagged sentry image found locally"
166	  else
167	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No kludge-tagged sentry image found"
168	  fi
169	  buh_e
170	
171	  buh_warn "Kludge requires a clean git tree."
172	  buh_line "If you have uncommitted changes, commit them first.  This is by"
173	  buh_line "design — container images not backed by git commits easy to confuse."
174	  buh_e
175	
176	  # --- Substep 1b: Kludge the bottle ---
177	  buh_step2 "Kludge the bottle"
178	  buh_e
179	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your workload container — where Claude Code"
180	  buh_line "runs. The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} bottle includes SSH, node, and the Claude CLI."
181	  buh_e
182	  buh_line "This command is different from the sentry kludge. It builds the"
183	  buh_line "bottle AND drives the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the nameplate"
184	  buh_line "automatically:"
185	  buh_e
186	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
187	  buh_e
188	  buh_line "Two kludge commands, two different jobs:"
189	  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_fk}  — standalone vessel kludge. Produces a hallmark, touches nothing else."
190	  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_cKB} — nameplate-aware bottle kludge. Builds AND installs the hallmark."
191	  buh_e
192	  buh_line "The sentry is shared across nameplates, so you kludge it standalone"
193	  buh_line "and drive the hallmark yourself. The bottle belongs to one nameplate,"
194	  buh_line "so the tool does the driving for you."
195	  buh_e
196	
197	  # Bottle kludge image probe
198	  if test "${z_bottle_image_exists}" = "1"; then
199	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Kludge-tagged bottle image found locally"
200	  else
201	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No kludge-tagged bottle image found"
202	  fi
203	  buh_e
204	
205	  # =================================================================
206	  # Step 2: Drive sentry hallmark into the nameplate
207	  # =================================================================
208	  buh_step1 "Drive sentry hallmark into the nameplate"
209	  buh_e
210	  buh_line "A ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} is the file that defines a Crucible — it specifies"
211	  buh_line "what ${RBYC_HALLMARK} to use for ${RBYC_SENTRY}, ${RBYC_PENTACLE}, and"
212	  buh_line "${RBYC_BOTTLE} containers. It lives at:"
213	  buh_e
214	  buh_code "   ${z_nameplate_file}"
215	  buh_e
216	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RBRN} file has two hallmark fields — one for the sentry"
217	  buh_line "and one for the bottle. The bottle kludge (Step 1.2) already drove"
218	  buh_line "its hallmark. Now you drive the sentry hallmark by hand."
219	  buh_e
220	  buh_line "Open the nameplate file and paste the sentry hallmark from Step 1.1"
221	  buh_line "into the ${z_cmd_sentry_hallmark} field."
222	  buh_e
223	  buh_line "This is deliberately manual — it teaches you what ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} are and"
224	  buh_line "where they live. You just saw the automated version with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE};"
225	  buh_line "now you see the mechanism underneath."
226	  buh_e
227	
228	  # Hallmark probes
229	  if test "${z_sentry_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
230	    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_sentry_field} = ${z_sentry_hallmark}"
231	  else
232	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK is empty — paste the sentry hallmark from Step 1.1"
233	  fi
234	  if test "${z_bottle_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
235	    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_bottle_field} = ${z_bottle_hallmark}"
236	  else
237	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK is empty — run Step 1.2 (bottle kludge)"
238	  fi
239	  buh_e
240	
241	  buh_line "After editing, commit the change — the next ${RBYC_KLUDGE} will need a"
242	  buh_line "clean tree:"
243	  buh_e
244	  buh_code "   git add ${z_nameplate_file}"
245	  buh_code "   git commit -m \"Drive sentry hallmark into ${z_moniker} nameplate\""
246	  buh_e
247	
248	  # =================================================================
249	  # Step 3: Charge the crucible
250	  # =================================================================
251	  buh_step1 "Charge the crucible"
252	  buh_e
253	  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} starts three containers from your nameplate:"
254	  buh_e
255	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_SENTRY}   — runs iptables + dnsmasq, enforces the network allowlist"
256	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_PENTACLE}  — establishes the network namespace shared with the bottle"
257	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_BOTTLE}    — your workload container (Claude Code lives here)"
258	  buh_e
259	  buh_line "The sentry mediates all traffic. The bottle never touches the"
260	  buh_line "network directly — everything routes through the sentry's rules."
261	  buh_e
262	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
263	  buh_e
264	  buh_line "Charge takes 10-30 seconds. It pulls the images from your local"
265	  buh_line "Docker, creates the enclave network, starts the containers, waits"
266	  buh_line "for the sentry to confirm its iptables rules are applied, then"
267	  buh_line "starts the bottle."
268	  buh_e
269	
270	  # Charged probe
271	  if test "${z_crucible_charged}" = "1"; then
272	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Crucible ${z_moniker} is charged (bottle container running)"
273	  else
274	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}Crucible ${z_moniker} is not charged"
275	  fi
276	  buh_e
277	
278	  # =================================================================
279	  # Step 4: Enter the container and run Claude Code
280	  # =================================================================
281	  buh_step1 "Enter the container and run Claude Code"
282	  buh_e
283	  buh_line "SSH into the bottle:"
284	  buh_e
285	  buh_line "   ${z_cmd_ssh}"
286	  buh_e
287	  buh_line "You land as the claude user in ~/workspace, which contains"
288	  buh_line "a small sample project. Run Claude Code:"
289	  buh_e
290	  buh_code "   claude"
291	  buh_e
292	  buh_line "Claude Code will prompt you to authenticate. It opens a URL —"
293	  buh_line "copy it to your workstation browser, sign in with your Claude"
294	  buh_line "subscription, and paste the code back into the terminal."
295	  buh_e
296	  buh_warn "The ccyolo bottle pins Claude Code to a specific version."
297	  buh_line "Versions after v2.1.89 have a regression where paste does not"
298	  buh_line "work in the OAuth input prompt through SSH or docker exec"
299	  buh_line "(github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/47745). If you"
300	  buh_line "update the pin and paste stops working, type the code manually."
301	  buh_e
302	  buh_line "Once authenticated, Claude Code starts in full autonomy mode —"
303	  buh_line "no permission prompts. Inside a network-contained crucible,"
304	  buh_line "this is the correct posture: the sentry enforces the real"
305	  buh_line "security boundary, not the tool permission system."
306	  buh_e
307	  buh_line "Try your first interaction:"
308	  buh_e
309	  buh_code "   The count_words.sh script has bugs — can you find and fix them?"
310	  buh_e
311	  buh_line "Watch Claude read the files, identify issues, and edit the code."
312	  buh_line "The workspace persists across charge/quench cycles — your changes"
313	  buh_line "survive restarts."
314	  buh_e
315	  buh_line "Why SSH instead of docker exec?"
316	  buh_e
317	  buh_line "Docker exec is laggy and breaks terminal resize — Claude Code's"
318	  buh_line "interactive display needs correct dimensions. SSH gives a proper"
319	  buh_line "login session with full terminal negotiation."
320	  buh_e
321	  buh_line "If SSH fails, ${RBYC_RACK} is the diagnostic fallback —"
322	  buh_line "docker exec into the bottle to inspect state:"
323	  buh_e
324	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
325	  buh_e
326	
327	  # =================================================================
328	  # Step 5: Verify network containment
329	  # =================================================================
330	  buh_step1 "Verify network containment"
331	  buh_e
332	  buh_line "From inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} (while SSH'd in), you can test what's reachable."
333	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} nameplate allows Anthropic and example.com (a test"
334	  buh_line "target). Everything else is blocked."
335	  buh_e
336	  buh_line "Run these curl commands inside the bottle:"
337	  buh_e
338	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.anthropic.com"
339	  buh_line "   Expected: 404 (API wants auth, not bare GET)"
340	  buh_e
341	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://claude.ai"
342	  buh_line "   Expected: 403 (web app)"
343	  buh_e
344	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://example.com"
345	  buh_line "   Expected: 200 (test target on allowlist)"
346	  buh_e
347	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://google.com"
348	  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
349	  buh_e
350	  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://registry.npmjs.org"
351	  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
352	  buh_e
353	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces this with two layers:"
354	  buh_line "dnsmasq resolves only whitelisted domains; iptables drops"
355	  buh_line "packets to any IP not in the CIDR allowlist. Both layers"
356	  buh_line "must agree for traffic to pass."
357	  buh_e
358	  buh_line "example.com is included in the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} specifically"
359	  buh_line "for this verification step — it proves the allowlist works"
360	  buh_line "for a non-Anthropic domain."
361	  buh_e
362	
363	  # =================================================================
364	  # Step 6: Quench the crucible
365	  # =================================================================
366	  buh_step1 "Quench the crucible"
367	  buh_e
368	  buh_line "${RBYC_QUENCH} stops and removes all three containers and the"
369	  buh_line "enclave network:"
370	  buh_e
371	  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${z_moniker}"
372	  buh_e
373	  buh_line "Clean shutdown. The images stay cached locally — your next charge"
374	  buh_line "reuses them instantly."
375	  buh_e
376	
377	  # =================================================================
378	  # Iteration loop
379	  # =================================================================
380	  buh_section "The iteration loop"
381	  buh_e
382	  buh_line "You now have the full local cycle:"
383	  buh_e
384	  buh_line "  1. Edit the Dockerfile or entrypoint"
385	  buh_line "  2. Commit your changes (${RBYC_KLUDGE} needs a clean tree)"
386	  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
387	  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
388	  buh_line  "  4. Commit the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} change"
389	  buh_line  "  5. ${RBYC_CHARGE}: Stop and restart"
390	  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
391	  buh_line  "  6. SSH in:"
392	  buh_line  "       ${z_cmd_ssh}"
393	  buh_line  "  7. Test your changes"
394	  buh_e
395	  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} tears down any prior state before starting, so you"
396	  buh_line "don't need to Quench between iterations — just Charge again."
397	  buh_e
398	  buh_line "Steps 3-7 take under a minute. The ${RBYC_SENTRY} rarely changes, so"
399	  buh_line "you almost never re-kludge it — the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your iteration"
400	  buh_line "target."
401	  buh_e
402	
403	  # --- Return to start ---
404	  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
405	  buh_e
406	}
407	
408	# eof
409

file.content:
#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - First Crucible (local builds)

set -euo pipefail

test -z "${ZRBHOFC_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
ZRBHOFC_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# First Crucible — local builds onboarding
#
# Frame 4-refined handbook: teaching prose + probes + tabtarget refs.
# Target learner: crucible explorer — local-only, zero cloud, fast
# iteration for security exploration. Zero registry, zero SA credentials.
#
# Nameplate: ccyolo  (Claude Code sandbox, Anthropic-only network)
# Vessels:   rbev-sentry-deb-tether (sentry), rbev-bottle-ccyolo (bottle)
#
# ₢A6AAC DRAFT — content ready for implementation review.
# Infrastructure gaps are marked with [INFRA-NEEDED] comments.
# Assumptions are marked with [ASSUMPTION].

rbho_first_crucible() {
  buc_doc_brief "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, SSH, verify containment"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Hardcoded for this track — ccyolo is the teaching nameplate
  local -r z_moniker="ccyolo"
  local -r z_sentry_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
  local -r z_bottle_vessel="rbev-bottle-ccyolo"
  local -r z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
  local -r z_ssh_tabtarget="tt/rbw-cS.SshTo.${z_moniker}.sh"

  # Inline yelps (not worth kindle constants — track-specific)
  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-fk";                local -r z_cmd_rbw_fk="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbw-cKB";               local -r z_cmd_rbw_cKB="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK=";  local -r z_cmd_sentry_hallmark="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_ssh_tabtarget}";     local -r z_cmd_ssh="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_sentry_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK";   local -r z_code_bottle_field="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "k260413155458-f9dcb6d9"; local -r z_example_tag="${z_buym_yelp}"

  # --- Probes ---

  # Docker runtime
  local z_has_docker=0
  command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_has_docker=1

  # Nameplate exists
  local z_nameplate_exists=0
  test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" && z_nameplate_exists=1

  # Hallmarks populated in nameplate
  local z_sentry_hallmark="" z_bottle_hallmark=""
  local z_sentry_hallmark_present=0 z_bottle_hallmark_present=0
  if test "${z_nameplate_exists}" = "1"; then
    z_sentry_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK") || z_sentry_hallmark=""
    z_bottle_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_nameplate_file}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_bottle_hallmark=""
    test -n "${z_sentry_hallmark}" && z_sentry_hallmark_present=1
    test -n "${z_bottle_hallmark}" && z_bottle_hallmark_present=1
  fi

  # Kludge-tagged images exist locally (k-prefixed hallmarks)
  local z_sentry_image_exists=0 z_bottle_image_exists=0
  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null \
       | grep -q "${z_sentry_vessel}:k[0-9]"; then
      z_sentry_image_exists=1
    fi
    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null \
       | grep -q "${z_bottle_vessel}:k[0-9]"; then
      z_bottle_image_exists=1
    fi
  fi

  # Crucible charged
  # [INFRA-NEEDED] Currently rbw-cic is a tabtarget (param1 channel).
  # For probe use, need a scriptable function that returns 0/1 without
  # running the full dispatch. For now, check docker containers directly.
  local z_crucible_charged=0
  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "1"; then
    if docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" 2>/dev/null \
       | grep -q "^${z_moniker}-bottle\$"; then
      z_crucible_charged=1
    fi
  fi

  # --- Header ---
  buh_section "Start a Crucible Using Local Builds"
  buh_e
  buh_line "A ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} is a sandboxed container environment with enforced"
  buh_line "network isolation. You are going to build one on your workstation"
  buh_line "and run Claude Code inside it — no cloud account, no credentials"
  buh_line "beyond your own Claude subscription."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This track uses the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}: a Claude Code sandbox that can"
  buh_line "only reach Anthropic. Everything else is blocked."
  buh_e

  # Docker gate
  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "0"; then
    buh_error "Docker is not available on this machine."
    buh_line  "Install Docker Desktop (or dockerd in WSL) and re-run this handbook."
    buh_e
    buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
    buh_e
    return 0
  fi

  buh_line "Prerequisite: a Claude OAuth subscription (you will authenticate"
  buh_line "inside the container via copy/paste from your browser)."
  buh_e

  buh_step_style "Step " " — "

  # =================================================================
  # Step 1: Build images locally
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Build images locally"
  buh_e
  buh_line "A ${RBYC_VESSEL} is a specification for a container image — a Dockerfile"
  buh_line "and build context. A ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is a specific build instance,"
  buh_line "identified by a timestamp tag."
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_KLUDGE} builds a vessel image locally using Docker — no cloud, no"
  buh_line "registry, no credentials. The fastest path from Dockerfile to running"
  buh_line "container without cloud image backup."
  buh_e

  # --- Substep 1a: Kludge the sentry ---
  buh_step2 "Kludge the sentry"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} is the gatekeeper container. It runs iptables"
  buh_line "and dnsmasq to enforce network policy — only domains you whitelist"
  buh_line "are reachable from inside."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Kludge it:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}" "" " ${z_sentry_vessel}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The output prints a hallmark tag — something like"
  buh_line "${z_example_tag}"
  buh_line "Copy it. You will paste it into the nameplate in Step 2."
  buh_e

  # Sentry kludge image probe
  if test "${z_sentry_image_exists}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Kludge-tagged sentry image found locally"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No kludge-tagged sentry image found"
  fi
  buh_e

  buh_warn "Kludge requires a clean git tree."
  buh_line "If you have uncommitted changes, commit them first.  This is by"
  buh_line "design — container images not backed by git commits easy to confuse."
  buh_e

  # --- Substep 1b: Kludge the bottle ---
  buh_step2 "Kludge the bottle"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your workload container — where Claude Code"
  buh_line "runs. The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} bottle includes SSH, node, and the Claude CLI."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This command is different from the sentry kludge. It builds the"
  buh_line "bottle AND drives the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the nameplate"
  buh_line "automatically:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Two kludge commands, two different jobs:"
  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_fk}  — standalone vessel kludge. Produces a hallmark, touches nothing else."
  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_cKB} — nameplate-aware bottle kludge. Builds AND installs the hallmark."
  buh_e
  buh_line "The sentry is shared across nameplates, so you kludge it standalone"
  buh_line "and drive the hallmark yourself. The bottle belongs to one nameplate,"
  buh_line "so the tool does the driving for you."
  buh_e

  # Bottle kludge image probe
  if test "${z_bottle_image_exists}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Kludge-tagged bottle image found locally"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No kludge-tagged bottle image found"
  fi
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 2: Drive sentry hallmark into the nameplate
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Drive sentry hallmark into the nameplate"
  buh_e
  buh_line "A ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} is the file that defines a Crucible — it specifies"
  buh_line "what ${RBYC_HALLMARK} to use for ${RBYC_SENTRY}, ${RBYC_PENTACLE}, and"
  buh_line "${RBYC_BOTTLE} containers. It lives at:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   ${z_nameplate_file}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RBRN} file has two hallmark fields — one for the sentry"
  buh_line "and one for the bottle. The bottle kludge (Step 1.2) already drove"
  buh_line "its hallmark. Now you drive the sentry hallmark by hand."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Open the nameplate file and paste the sentry hallmark from Step 1.1"
  buh_line "into the ${z_cmd_sentry_hallmark} field."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This is deliberately manual — it teaches you what ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} are and"
  buh_line "where they live. You just saw the automated version with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE};"
  buh_line "now you see the mechanism underneath."
  buh_e

  # Hallmark probes
  if test "${z_sentry_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_sentry_field} = ${z_sentry_hallmark}"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK is empty — paste the sentry hallmark from Step 1.1"
  fi
  if test "${z_bottle_hallmark_present}" = "1"; then
    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_bottle_field} = ${z_bottle_hallmark}"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK is empty — run Step 1.2 (bottle kludge)"
  fi
  buh_e

  buh_line "After editing, commit the change — the next ${RBYC_KLUDGE} will need a"
  buh_line "clean tree:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   git add ${z_nameplate_file}"
  buh_code "   git commit -m \"Drive sentry hallmark into ${z_moniker} nameplate\""
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 3: Charge the crucible
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Charge the crucible"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} starts three containers from your nameplate:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_SENTRY}   — runs iptables + dnsmasq, enforces the network allowlist"
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_PENTACLE}  — establishes the network namespace shared with the bottle"
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_BOTTLE}    — your workload container (Claude Code lives here)"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The sentry mediates all traffic. The bottle never touches the"
  buh_line "network directly — everything routes through the sentry's rules."
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Charge takes 10-30 seconds. It pulls the images from your local"
  buh_line "Docker, creates the enclave network, starts the containers, waits"
  buh_line "for the sentry to confirm its iptables rules are applied, then"
  buh_line "starts the bottle."
  buh_e

  # Charged probe
  if test "${z_crucible_charged}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Crucible ${z_moniker} is charged (bottle container running)"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}Crucible ${z_moniker} is not charged"
  fi
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 4: Enter the container and run Claude Code
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Enter the container and run Claude Code"
  buh_e
  buh_line "SSH into the bottle:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_cmd_ssh}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You land as the claude user in ~/workspace, which contains"
  buh_line "a small sample project. Run Claude Code:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   claude"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Claude Code will prompt you to authenticate. It opens a URL —"
  buh_line "copy it to your workstation browser, sign in with your Claude"
  buh_line "subscription, and paste the code back into the terminal."
  buh_e
  buh_warn "The ccyolo bottle pins Claude Code to a specific version."
  buh_line "Versions after v2.1.89 have a regression where paste does not"
  buh_line "work in the OAuth input prompt through SSH or docker exec"
  buh_line "(github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/47745). If you"
  buh_line "update the pin and paste stops working, type the code manually."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Once authenticated, Claude Code starts in full autonomy mode —"
  buh_line "no permission prompts. Inside a network-contained crucible,"
  buh_line "this is the correct posture: the sentry enforces the real"
  buh_line "security boundary, not the tool permission system."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Try your first interaction:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   The count_words.sh script has bugs — can you find and fix them?"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Watch Claude read the files, identify issues, and edit the code."
  buh_line "The workspace persists across charge/quench cycles — your changes"
  buh_line "survive restarts."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Why SSH instead of docker exec?"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Docker exec is laggy and breaks terminal resize — Claude Code's"
  buh_line "interactive display needs correct dimensions. SSH gives a proper"
  buh_line "login session with full terminal negotiation."
  buh_e
  buh_line "If SSH fails, ${RBYC_RACK} is the diagnostic fallback —"
  buh_line "docker exec into the bottle to inspect state:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 5: Verify network containment
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Verify network containment"
  buh_e
  buh_line "From inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} (while SSH'd in), you can test what's reachable."
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} nameplate allows Anthropic and example.com (a test"
  buh_line "target). Everything else is blocked."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Run these curl commands inside the bottle:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.anthropic.com"
  buh_line "   Expected: 404 (API wants auth, not bare GET)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://claude.ai"
  buh_line "   Expected: 403 (web app)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://example.com"
  buh_line "   Expected: 200 (test target on allowlist)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://google.com"
  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://registry.npmjs.org"
  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces this with two layers:"
  buh_line "dnsmasq resolves only whitelisted domains; iptables drops"
  buh_line "packets to any IP not in the CIDR allowlist. Both layers"
  buh_line "must agree for traffic to pass."
  buh_e
  buh_line "example.com is included in the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} specifically"
  buh_line "for this verification step — it proves the allowlist works"
  buh_line "for a non-Anthropic domain."
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Step 6: Quench the crucible
  # =================================================================
  buh_step1 "Quench the crucible"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_QUENCH} stops and removes all three containers and the"
  buh_line "enclave network:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Clean shutdown. The images stay cached locally — your next charge"
  buh_line "reuses them instantly."
  buh_e

  # =================================================================
  # Iteration loop
  # =================================================================
  buh_section "The iteration loop"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You now have the full local cycle:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  1. Edit the Dockerfile or entrypoint"
  buh_line "  2. Commit your changes (${RBYC_KLUDGE} needs a clean tree)"
  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
  buh_line  "  4. Commit the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} change"
  buh_line  "  5. ${RBYC_CHARGE}: Stop and restart"
  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_line  "  6. SSH in:"
  buh_line  "       ${z_cmd_ssh}"
  buh_line  "  7. Test your changes"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} tears down any prior state before starting, so you"
  buh_line "don't need to Quench between iterations — just Charge again."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Steps 3-7 take under a minute. The ${RBYC_SENTRY} rarely changes, so"
  buh_line "you almost never re-kludge it — the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your iteration"
  buh_line "target."
  buh_e

  # --- Return to start ---
  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
  buh_e
}

# eof

content.content:
1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Director First Cloud Build
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	test -z "${ZRBHODF_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
24	ZRBHODF_SOURCED=1
25	
26	######################################################################
27	# Director First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure
28	#
29	# Frame 4-refined handbook: teaching prose + probes + tabtarget refs.
30	# Target learner: director doing their first cloud build.
31	#
32	# Vessel: rbev-sentry-deb-tether (conjure mode, tethered)
33	# Teaches: full conjure lifecycle from reliquary through cleanup.
34	#
35	# ₢A6AAU — Director subtracks, first cloud build track.
36	
37	rbho_director_first_build() {
38	  buc_doc_brief "Your First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
39	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
40	
41	  local -r z_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
42	
43	  # --- Probes ---
44	
45	  # Director credential present
46	  local z_has_director=0 z_secrets_dir=""
47	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
48	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
49	  fi
50	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
51	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
52	    z_has_director=1
53	  fi
54	
55	  # Depot configured
56	  local z_has_depot=0
57	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
58	    local z_line=""
59	    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
60	      case "${z_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_has_depot=1; break ;; esac
61	    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
62	  fi
63	
64	  # Conjured sentry image summoned locally (c-prefixed hallmark from GAR)
65	  local z_conjure_summoned=0
66	  if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
67	    local z_project_id="" z_region=""
68	    if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
69	      z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
70	      z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
71	    fi
72	    if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
73	      if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null \
74	         | grep -q "${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/.*${z_vessel}:c[0-9]"; then
75	        z_conjure_summoned=1
76	      fi
77	    fi
78	  fi
79	
80	  # --- Function-specific yelp captures (not in RBYC vocabulary) ---
81	
82	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel" "rbev-sentry-deb-tether"; local -r z_lk_vessel_name="${z_buym_yelp}"
83	
84	  # --- Header ---
85	  buh_section "Your First Cloud Build"
86	  buh_e
87	  buh_line "This track walks you through the complete ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
88	  buh_line "provision the builder toolchain, ${RBYC_ORDAIN} your first ${RBYC_VESSEL} via"
89	  buh_line "Cloud Build, inspect the result, pull it locally, and clean up."
90	  buh_e
91	  buh_line "You will build ${z_lk_vessel_name} — the same ${RBYC_SENTRY} you"
92	  buh_line "already know from the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} track, but this time built by"
93	  buh_line "Google Cloud Build with full SLSA provenance."
94	  buh_e
95	
96	  # Prerequisite probes
97	  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
98	  buh_e
99	  buyy_pass_yawp "[*] Director credential installed";          local -r z_dir_pass="${z_buym_yelp}"
100	  buyy_fail_yawp "[ ] Director credential missing — run:";    local -r z_dir_fail="${z_buym_yelp}"
101	  buh_ternary "${z_has_director}" " ${z_dir_pass}" " ${z_dir_fail}"
102	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0"; then
103	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
104	  fi
105	  buyy_pass_yawp "[*] Depot configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)";          local -r z_dep_pass="${z_buym_yelp}"
106	  buyy_fail_yawp "[ ] Depot not configured — the Payor must establish the Depot:";  local -r z_dep_fail="${z_buym_yelp}"
107	  buh_ternary "${z_has_depot}" " ${z_dep_pass}" " ${z_dep_fail}"
108	  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
109	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
110	  fi
111	  buh_e
112	
113	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
114	    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
115	    buh_e
116	    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
117	    buh_e
118	    return 0
119	  fi
120	
121	  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
122	  buh_e
123	  buh_code "   export ONBOARD_VESSEL=${z_vessel}"
124	  buh_e
125	  buh_line "This sets the vessel you will build throughout the track."
126	  buh_line "The remaining steps reference it by name."
127	  buh_e
128	
129	  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
130	
131	  buh_step1 "Inscribe the Reliquary"
132	  buh_e
133	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is a set of builder tool images (skopeo,"
134	  buh_line "docker, gcloud, syft) that Cloud Build uses during ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
135	  buh_line "construction. Without it, conjure's preflight check fails."
136	  buh_e
137	  buh_line "Think of it as installing the toolchain before your first build."
138	  buh_line "This is a one-time operation — once inscribed, the reliquary"
139	  buh_line "stays in the ${RBYC_DEPOT} until you choose to refresh it."
140	  buh_e
141	  buh_line "Periodically re-inscribe to pick up newer tool versions. All ${RBYC_VESSELS}"
142	  buh_line "share the same ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — one inscribe updates the toolchain"
143	  buh_line "for every build."
144	  buh_e
145	  buh_line "Inscribe:"
146	  buh_e
147	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
148	  buh_e
149	  buh_line "This mirrors four tool images from upstream into your Depot's"
150	  buh_line "GAR. Takes 2-5 minutes depending on network speed."
151	  buh_e
152	  buyy_cmd_yawp "r260324193326";                   local -r z_ds_example="${z_buym_yelp}"
153	  buh_line "When inscribe completes, it prints a reliquary datestamp"
154	  buh_line "(e.g., ${z_ds_example}). Every vessel that uses Cloud Build"
155	  buh_line "needs this value in its regime file:"
156	  buh_e
157	  buh_code "   RBRV_RELIQUARY=<datestamp>"
158	  buh_e
159	  buyy_cmd_yawp "rbev-sentry-deb-tether/rbrv.env"; local -r z_rbrv_file="${z_buym_yelp}"
160	  buh_line "Open ${z_rbrv_file} and set the field,"
161	  buh_line "then commit the change."
162	  buh_e
163	
164	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
165	  buh_e
166	  buh_line "${RBYC_CONJURE} is the build mode where Cloud Build constructs a"
167	  buh_line "vessel image from the project's Dockerfile and build context."
168	  buh_e
169	  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} is the command that triggers the full pipeline —"
170	  buh_line "it reads the vessel's ${RBYC_RBRV} regime to determine the mode"
171	  buh_line "(conjure, bind, or graft) and acts accordingly:"
172	  buh_e
173	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" ' ${ONBOARD_VESSEL}'
174	  buh_e
175	  buh_line "This builds on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build has"
176	  buh_line "public internet access and pulls base images from upstream"
177	  buh_line "registries during the build. (The ${RBYC_AIRGAP} track removes"
178	  buh_line "that dependency.)"
179	  buh_e
180	  buh_line "The pipeline:"
181	  buh_e
182	  buh_line "  1. The host mints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} — a timestamped tag"
183	  buh_line "     identifying this build"
184	  buh_line "  2. A ${RBYC_POUCH} (build context archive) is pushed to GAR"
185	  buh_line "  3. Cloud Build constructs the image across platforms"
186	  buh_line "  4. SLSA provenance is generated per platform digest"
187	  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies the provenance chain"
188	  buh_e
189	  buh_warn "Wall-clock: ~15-20 minutes for a 3-platform build."
190	  buh_line "The command blocks until Cloud Build finishes. Use the time"
191	  buh_line "to read ahead — the next steps explain what to look for."
192	  buh_e
193	
194	  buh_step1 "Capture the hallmark"
195	  buh_e
196	  buh_line "When ${RBYC_ORDAIN} completes, it writes the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
197	  buh_line "to the ${RBYC_OUTPUT} directory — a fixed-path staging area"
198	  buh_line "that each tabtarget clears and recreates on entry."
199	  buh_line "Read the hallmark from the fact file and export it so"
200	  buh_line "you can copy-paste the commands in the remaining steps:"
201	  buh_e
202	  buh_code "   export ONBOARD_HALLMARK=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
203	  buh_e
204	
205	  buh_step1 "Tour the hallmark artifacts"
206	  buh_e
207	  buh_line "Every conjured ${RBYC_HALLMARK} produces a set of tagged"
208	  buh_line "artifacts in GAR. Each suffix serves a specific role:"
209	  buh_e
210	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}";        local -r z_sfx_pouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
211	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}";        local -r z_sfx_image="${z_buym_yelp}"
212	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}-{arch}"; local -r z_sfx_attest="${z_buym_yelp}"
213	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}";        local -r z_sfx_about="${z_buym_yelp}"
214	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}";        local -r z_sfx_vouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
215	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}";        local -r z_sfx_diags="${z_buym_yelp}"
216	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_pouch}"
217	  buh_line "      A FROM SCRATCH OCI image pushed from host to GAR before"
218	  buh_line "      the build. Contains the Dockerfile, scripts, and"
219	  buh_line "      configuration Cloud Build needs. Identical for tethered"
220	  buh_line "      and airgapped builds — the pool determines network"
221	  buh_line "      access, not the pouch."
222	  buh_e
223	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_image}"
224	  buh_line "      The consumer image — a multiplatform manifest list."
225	  buh_line "      This is what you pull and run."
226	  buh_e
227	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_attest}"
228	  buh_line "      Per-platform provenance-carrying image (one per platform)."
229	  buh_line "      Shares all layers with -image — only the manifest differs."
230	  buh_line "      These carry the GCB-attested digests used by vouch."
231	  buh_e
232	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_about}"
233	  buh_line "      SBOM (software bill of materials) + build info."
234	  buh_e
235	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_vouch}"
236	  buh_line "      SLSA provenance verification record."
237	  buh_e
238	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_diags}"
239	  buh_line "      Diagnostics from the build."
240	  buh_e
241	  buh_line "Inspect them:"
242	  buh_e
243	
244	  buh_step2 "Tally"
245	  buh_e
246	  buh_line "${RBYC_TALLY} lists all hallmarks and their health state:"
247	  buh_e
248	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
249	  buh_e
250	  buh_line "Look for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} with health state 'vouched' — that"
251	  buh_line "means SLSA provenance was verified."
252	  buh_e
253	
254	  buh_step2 "Vouch"
255	  buh_e
256	  buh_line "${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies SLSA provenance for each platform"
257	  buh_line "digest in the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. The ordain pipeline runs ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
258	  buh_line "automatically. If a build was interrupted before ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
259	  buh_line "completed, run this to reattempt ${RBYC_VOUCH} on untreated ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
260	  buh_e
261	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
262	  buh_e
263	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CONJURE} verdict is full SLSA — Cloud Build produced"
264	  buh_line "this image, and the provenance chain proves it."
265	  buh_e
266	
267	  buh_step2 "Plumb"
268	  buh_e
269	  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the SBOM, build info, and Dockerfile"
270	  buh_line "that produced the hallmark. Two modes:"
271	  buh_e
272	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" ' ${ONBOARD_VESSEL} ${ONBOARD_HALLMARK}'
273	  buh_line "   Full provenance display — SBOM packages, build parameters,"
274	  buh_line "   Dockerfile content."
275	  buh_e
276	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}" "" ' ${ONBOARD_VESSEL} ${ONBOARD_HALLMARK}'
277	  buh_line "   Compact summary — one-line-per-artifact overview."
278	  buh_e
279	
280	  buh_step1 "Summon the hallmark"
281	  buh_e
282	  buh_line "${RBYC_SUMMON} pulls a set of images affiliated with a"
283	  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} that has been ${RBYC_VOUCHED} to your local"
284	  buh_line "Docker image cache:"
285	  buh_e
286	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}" "" ' ${ONBOARD_VESSEL} ${ONBOARD_HALLMARK}'
287	  buh_e
288	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"; local -r z_sfx_img2="${z_buym_yelp}"
289	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_img2}"
290	  buh_line "   is a multiplatform manifest list."
291	  buh_line "   Docker resolves it to the image matching your host"
292	  buh_line "   architecture — the same image that ${RBYC_CHARGE} uses when"
293	  buh_line "   starting a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} from cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}."
294	  buh_e
295	
296	  # Summoned probe
297	  buyy_pass_yawp "[*] Conjured sentry image found locally (summoned from GAR)";       local -r z_sum_pass="${z_buym_yelp}"
298	  buyy_fail_yawp "[ ] No conjured sentry image found locally — run ${RBYC_SUMMON} above"; local -r z_sum_fail="${z_buym_yelp}"
299	  buh_ternary "${z_conjure_summoned}" " ${z_sum_pass}" " ${z_sum_fail}"
300	  buh_e
301	
302	  buh_step1 "Abjure and Rekon — hallmark lifecycle"
303	  buh_e
304	  buh_line "${RBYC_REKON} lists the raw tags for a ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
305	  buh_line "package in GAR. Run it before and after ${RBYC_ABJURE} to see"
306	  buh_line "the full lifecycle:"
307	  buh_e
308	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" ' ${ONBOARD_VESSEL}'
309	  buh_e
310	  buh_line "You should see all five durable tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK}:"
311	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}"; local -r z_sfx_list="${z_buym_yelp}"
312	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_list}"
313	  buh_e
314	  buh_line "${RBYC_ABJURE} removes all artifacts for a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
315	  buh_line "from GAR. This is permanent — the hallmark and all its"
316	  buh_line "tags are deleted:"
317	  buh_e
318	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}" "" ' ${ONBOARD_VESSEL} ${ONBOARD_HALLMARK}'
319	  buh_e
320	  buh_line "After abjure, run Rekon again:"
321	  buh_e
322	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" ' ${ONBOARD_VESSEL}'
323	  buh_e
324	  buh_line "The tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} should be gone. The image is no"
325	  buh_line "longer in the ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
326	  buh_e
327	
328	  buh_section "What you learned"
329	  buh_e
330	  buh_line "You just completed the full conjure lifecycle:"
331	  buh_e
332	  buh_line "  1. ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — builder toolchain provisioned"
333	  buh_line "  2. ${RBYC_CONJURE} — vessel built by Cloud Build with SLSA provenance"
334	  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_TALLY}/${RBYC_VOUCH} — health and provenance verified"
335	  buh_line "  4. ${RBYC_PLUMB} — SBOM and build info inspected"
336	  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_SUMMON} — consumer image pulled locally"
337	  buh_line "  6. ${RBYC_ABJURE}/${RBYC_REKON} — lifecycle cleanup"
338	  buh_e
339	  buh_line "This was a ${RBYC_TETHERED} build — Cloud Build had"
340	  buh_line "internet access. The next track teaches you to remove"
341	  buh_line "that dependency entirely."
342	  buh_e
343	
344	  # --- Return to start ---
345	  buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
346	  buh_e
347	}

349	# eof
